title: pleopeltis fructuosa
intro: Pleopeltis fructuosa, also known as the fruiting polypody, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pleopeltis fructuosa include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
